data.cta_english: Is CR7 the greatest of all time? Comment below!

segments.voice_english: A poor Portuguese kid had nothing, but he later won five Ballon d'Ors.
segments.image_query: poor Portuguese kid playing football on a dusty street sunset
segments.subtitle_english: A poor Portuguese kid had nothing, but he later won five Ballon d'Ors.
segments.voice_hindi: एक गरीब पुर्तगाली बच्चे के पास कुछ भी नहीं था, लेकिन बाद में उसने पांच बैलन डी'ऑर्स जीते।

segments.voice_english: Many people doubted his dream, but he still became the Portugal national captain.
segments.image_query: depressed young football player sitting on a bench crying in the rain
segments.subtitle_english: Many people doubted his dream, but he still became the Portugal national captain.
segments.voice_hindi: कई लोगों को उनके सपने पर संदेह था, लेकिन फिर भी वे पुर्तगाल के राष्ट्रीय कप्तान बने।

segments.voice_english: He dominated Europe with his goals and won four European Golden Shoes.
segments.image_query: Cristiano Ronaldo holding European Golden Shoe trophy smiling
segments.subtitle_english: He dominated Europe with his goals and won four European Golden Shoes.
segments.voice_hindi: उन्होंने अपने लक्ष्यों से यूरोप पर दबदबा बनाया और चार यूरोपीय गोल्डन शूज़ जीते।

segments.voice_english: He won three UEFA Men's Player awards, so that poor kid captains Al-Nassr.
segments.image_query: Cristiano Ronaldo Al-Nassr captain celebrating on the field
segments.subtitle_english: He won three UEFA Men's Player awards, so that poor kid captains Al-Nassr.
segments.voice_hindi: उन्होंने तीन यूईएफए पुरुष खिलाड़ी पुरस्कार जीते, जिससे गरीब बच्चा अल-नासर की कप्तानी कर सका।

data.youtube_title: CR7 ki Zero se Hero Wali Insane Journey 🔥
title_options: CR7 ki Zero se Hero Wali Insane Journey 🔥
CR7: Ek Gareeb Bachha Kaise Bana King? 🥺
Ronaldo ke Is Secret ne Sabko Shock Kiya! 🤯
data.description: Ek gareeb bacha jiske paas kuch nahi tha, wo football ka King kaise bana? 🤯 CR7 ne saare doubts ko piche chodkar 5 Ballon d'Or aur 4 European Golden Shoes apne naam kiye. Aaj wo Al-Nassr aur Portugal ke captain hain, par ye safar bilkul aasan nahi tha. Kya Ronaldo hi football history ka ultimate GOAT hai? Comment me batao! 👇

segments.voice_english: Argentina wanted consecutive trophies, but Spain defeated them in the dramatic 2026 final.
segments.subtitle_english: Argentina wanted consecutive trophies, but Spain defeated them in the dramatic 2026 final.
segments.voice_hindi: अर्जेंटीना लगातार ट्रॉफियां चाहता था, लेकिन नाटकीय 2026 फाइनल में स्पेन ने उन्हें हरा दिया।

segments.voice_english: The intense match remained goalless, so both teams fought hard into extra time.
segments.subtitle_english: The intense match remained goalless, so both teams fought hard into extra time.
segments.voice_hindi: यह कड़ा मुकाबला गोलरहित रहा, इसलिए दोनों टीमों ने अतिरिक्त समय में कड़ा संघर्ष किया।

segments.voice_english: Ferran Torres scored the winning goal, and Spain secured their second World Cup.
segments.subtitle_english: Ferran Torres scored the winning goal, and Spain secured their 2 World Cup.
segments.voice_hindi: फेरान टोरेस ने विजयी गोल किया और स्पेन ने अपना दूसरा विश्व कप सुरक्षित कर लिया।

segments.voice_english: Argentina lost the epic match, because Paredes got into a fight with Garcia.
segments.subtitle_english: Argentina lost the epic match, because Paredes got into a fight with Garcia.
segments.voice_hindi: अर्जेंटीना यह ऐतिहासिक मैच हार गया, क्योंकि पेरेडेस का गार्सिया से झगड़ा हो गया।

title_options: Argentina Ka Sapna Toota! 💔 Spain Won World Cup!

data.description: Argentina ka consecutive World Cup jeetne ka sapna toot gaya! 💔 Extra time mein Ferran Torres ke insane goal se Spain ne 1-0 se baazi maar li. Match ke baad Paredes aur Garcia ki fight ne drama aur badha diya! 😡 Kya Spain ye trophy deserve karti thi? Comment mein batao! 👇

segments.voice_english: But Kaka dismissed these comparisons because nobody can compare anyone to Lionel Messi.
segments.subtitle_english: But Kaka dismissed these comparisons because nobody can compare anyone to Lionel Messi.

Aapko kya lagta hai, kya Yamal sach me Messi ke level tak pahunch payenge? Comment me batao! 👇
